pull_request.title: Enable pandas 3+ compatibility across dependencies and runtime checks
pull_request.body:
- [x] Inspect CI workflow run and failing job logs
- [x] Update code/tests to handle pandas 3 readonly buffers
- [x] Run targeted tests to validate fixes (tests/aeq/paths/test_select_link.py::test_kaitang)
- [x] Provide update and reply to PR comment

<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT TIPS -->
---

✨ Let Copilot coding agent [set things up for you](https://github.com/AequilibraE/aequilibrae/issues/new?title=✨+Set+up+Copilot+instructions&body=Configure%20instructions%20for%20this%20repository%20as%20documented%20in%20%5BBest%20practices%20for%20Copilot%20coding%20agent%20in%20your%20repository%5D%28https://gh.io/copilot-coding-agent-tips%29%2E%0A%0A%3COnboard%20this%20repo%3E&assignees=copilot) — coding agent works faster and does higher quality work when set up for your repo.

changed_files.patch:
@@ -20,10 +20,10 @@ jobs:
       HAS_SECRETS: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY != '' }}
     steps:
     - uses: actions/checkout@v6
-    - name: Set up Python 3.10
+    - name: Set up Python 3.11
       uses: actions/setup-python@v6
       with:
-        python-version: '3.10'
+        python-version: '3.11'
         architecture: x64
   
     - name: Install

@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ jobs:

+        python-version: [3.13]

       - uses: actions/checkout@v6

+def _assign_aggregation_fields(

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+import pandas as pd
+import pytest
+
+from aequilibrae.transit.transit_elements.basic_element import BasicPTElement
+
+
+class DummyElement(BasicPTElement):
+    def __init__(self):
+        self.foo = None
+        self.bar = None
+
+
+def test_basic_element_from_row_sets_attributes():
+    element = DummyElement()
+    element.from_row(pd.Series({"foo": 1, "bar": "baz"}))
+    assert element.foo == 1
+    assert element.bar == "baz"
+
+
+def test_basic_element_from_row_rejects_unknown_key():
+    element = DummyElement()
+    with pytest.raises(KeyError):
+        element.from_row(pd.Series({"foo": 1, "missing": "nope"}))
